---
title: "_template.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\skills\_template.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.25
style_score: 3.78
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.73
---

## Intent
The `_template.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `main`
